title: The Corrupted Clan Horror
description: A modpack based around the ARG horror mod: The Broken Script
body:
Need a server? Click [HERE](https://bisecthosting.com/kamussy) to get one 25% off!

---

**Search tags:** horror, scary, dweller, entity, entities, tbs, the broken script, thebrokenscript, stalker, psychological

---

If you have any complaints, comments, questions, or suggestions, please join the [Discord server](https://discord.gg/fYrff3FXG3)

---

Description:

This modpack includes TBS 1.9.3, a newer version of TBS on neoforge. There are many unexplainable events in this modpack, random structures, entities, jumpscares, and ambient events. For exapmle, players will join your single player world, you'll hear noises, you'll see things, you'll find anomalies, you'll come across structures and buildings, you'll be taken against your will, and more. Also, it is a very slow modpack, you'll have to play for a while to see everything. If you want to make it faster, join the discord server and ask how, and myself will or a helper will help. This modpack also has vein miner, e4mc, embeddium, dynamic lights, and makeup ultra fast shader pack to make the gameplay more enjoyable. 

---
